prompt: Create a cinematic vertical cyberpunk photorealistic scene set inside a late-night subway train during heavy rain. In the foreground, a hand with long glossy black-and-pink stiletto nails holds a large black smartphone angled toward the camera. The phone displays a dark music player interface for Midnight Reverie by LUNA; the album cover shows the same gothic woman sitting in the train, with her face intentionally covered by a dark square. The phone UI includes exactly 11 visible interface elements: the time 23:47, the small playlist title “Night Drive,” one album cover image, the song title, the artist name, one pink heart icon, one pink progress bar with timestamps 1:53 and 4:08, five main playback controls arranged in a row with a large pink pause button in the center, and four small bottom icons. In the midground to the right, the real woman from the album cover sits on the subway bench, wearing a glossy black latex gothic outfit with choker, buckles, straps, long sleeves, thigh straps, and high-shine black styling; she has short messy black bob, silver earrings, and her face is covered by a dark square. Outside the large train window is a rainy neon city at night with wet reflections, purple and electric-blue lighting, skyscrapers, glowing Japanese and cyberpunk signs, and streaks of rain on the glass. Inside the train, show metal poles, dark seats, ceiling lights, graffiti, posters, and a few distant passengers; one passenger on the left is looking at a phone and has a blurred or obscured face. Use a moody deep violet, magenta, electric blue, and black palette, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections on latex and glass, rain-soaked atmosphere, and the feeling of riding the last train while listening to music. No watermark, no extra captions outside the phone UI, no extra people in the foreground.
